title: Minimalist Productivity App
description: An app that only lets you write max 3 tasks per day to focus purely on completion without feeling overwhelmed.

title: Local Coffee Shop Finder
description: A directory specifically tracking independent coffee shops with good WiFi and power outlets for remote workers.

title: AI Story Generator
description: Provide 3 words and let the AI generate a random fairy tale or short sci-fi story.

title: Smart Plant Pot
description: A plant pot that changes color based on moisture levels, allowing easy visualization of when to water.

title: CSS Layout Generator
description: Visual tool to generate complex CSS Grid layouts instantly by dragging and dropping boxes.

title: Smart City Navigation
description: Navigate through the city with minimum distance
